message:
fix(parser,render-term): use is_none_or for keyword check and suppress clippy too_many_arguments

Replace .map_or(true, ...) with .is_none_or(...) in
is_non_graph_statement's keyword boundary check for clearer intent.

Remove unreachable vertical/horizontal line glyph branches in
line_glyph_for_direction — when x0==x1 or y0==y1 the diagonal
check above already handles these cases, so the dead branches
produced incorrect glyphs for certain edge angles.

Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] to render_node_canvas and
overlay_labels which legitimately need padding/scale parameters
after the recent rendering pipeline refactor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
